summary: Multiple Catalogs Feature Testing Complete - Backend: 20 passed, 2 skipped (90.9%). Frontend: All UI flows verified. Feature allows users to create multiple catalogs with individual margin rules and select which catalog to export to WooCommerce.

issues: React warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' - existing issue in Login.jsx navigation logic

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/catalogs - creates catalog with name, description, is_default
Backend: GET /api/catalogs - lists all user catalogs with product_count and margin_rules_count
Backend: GET /api/catalogs/{id} - retrieves specific catalog details
Backend: PUT /api/catalogs/{id} - updates catalog name, description
Backend: PUT /api/catalogs/{id} - sets catalog as default, unsets others
Backend: DELETE /api/catalogs/{id} - deletes catalog, items, and rules
Backend: POST /api/catalogs/{id}/margin-rules - creates percentage margin rule
Backend: POST /api/catalogs/{id}/margin-rules - creates fixed amount margin rule
Backend: POST /api/catalogs/{id}/margin-rules - creates category-specific rule
Backend: GET /api/catalogs/{id}/margin-rules - lists catalog margin rules
Backend: DELETE /api/catalogs/{id}/margin-rules/{rule_id} - removes margin rule
Backend: GET /api/catalogs/{id}/products - lists products in catalog
Backend: GET /api/catalogs/{id}/products?search= - searches products in catalog
Backend: GET /api/catalogs - returns catalogs for WooCommerce export selection
Backend: GET /api/woocommerce/configs - WooCommerce configs endpoint working
Backend: POST /api/catalogs without name - returns 422 validation error
Backend: GET /api/catalogs/{fake_id} - returns 404 for non-existent catalog
Backend: POST /api/catalogs/{fake_id}/products - returns 404 for non-existent catalog
Backend: First catalog becomes default automatically
Backend: Catalog product_count statistic updates correctly
Frontend: /catalogs page loads with stats (Total Catálogos, Total Productos, Reglas de Margen, Por Defecto)
Frontend: 'Nuevo Catálogo' button opens create dialog
Frontend: Create catalog dialog has name, description, and is_default toggle fields
Frontend: Catalog creation succeeds with success toast 'Catálogo creado'
Frontend: Catalog cards display with Ver and Márgenes buttons
Frontend: Clicking Ver navigates to /catalogs/{id} catalog detail page
Frontend: Catalog detail page shows products table and 'Añadir Productos' button
Frontend: /catalog route redirects to /catalogs
Frontend: Sidebar has 'Catálogos' navigation link
Frontend: WooCommerce export page shows 'Catálogos Disponibles' count
Frontend: WooCommerce export dialog has 'Catálogo a exportar' dropdown selector
Frontend: Catalog selector shows catalog name with product count
Frontend: Márgenes button opens margin rules dialog for specific catalog
Frontend: Margin rules dialog shows form with Nombre, Tipo, Valor, Aplicar a, Prioridad fields
critical_code_review_comments: Login.jsx has React warning about updating state during render - should use useEffect for redirect logic
Sidebar.jsx has duplicate nav-catalogs elements (mobile and desktop) - may cause selector issues in tests

success_rate.backend: 90.9% (20/22 passed, 2 skipped due to no products)

seed_data_creation: Created test catalogs 'UI Test Catalog' and WooCommerce config 'Test Store' during UI tests (cleaned up after testing). Existing catalog 'Mi Tienda Online' preserved.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multiple Catalogs feature is fully implemented and working. Backend has /api/catalogs endpoints for CRUD, /api/catalogs/{id}/products for catalog items, and /api/catalogs/{id}/margin-rules for catalog-specific margin rules. Frontend has Catalogs.jsx for list/create, CatalogDetail.jsx for viewing products, and WooCommerceExport.jsx has catalog selector in export dialog. The /catalog route redirects to /catalogs. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_catalogs.py covers all backend APIs.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - This is feature testing, not bug fixing
